# t8.1 - Implementation-Plan Metadata Repair

## Summary

Reissued the `t7` planning package so every inline task now carries explicit requirement traceability, required evidence, and fallback validation guidance. The repair also adds rewrite-mode source anchors to `T015` and `T016`, and synchronizes the summary and checkpoint metadata with the 16 plan items defined in the detailed plan.

## Deliverables

- Updated `artifacts/t7-teamlead-plan.md` with task-level `[REQ:]`, `[Evidence:]`, and `[Fallback:]` metadata for `T001` through `T016`.
- Added explicit rewrite-mode `[Source:]` anchors to `T015` and `T016` using the relevant parity surfaces plus the approved `t6` and `t4.1` planning inputs.
- Corrected `artifacts/t7-teamlead.md` so the coverage summary reports 16 plan items.
- Refreshed `artifacts/checkpoints/plan-to-tasks.yaml` so the package metadata reflects the repaired task annotations.

## Notes

- The repair stays within the producer scope of the implementation-plan package. The binary re-gate remains owned by `t8`.
- No application source files were changed.

## Test Results

- Command: PowerShell metadata validation over `artifacts/t7-teamlead-plan.md` and `artifacts/t7-teamlead.md` to verify 16 task lines, zero missing `[REQ:]`/`[Evidence:]`/`[Fallback:]` markers, present `[Source:]` markers on `T015` and `T016`, and summary count parity.
- Passed: 1
- Failed: 0
- Skipped: 0
